assertions.expectation: Recommends migrating all 'No channel' clusters to release channels as a first priority
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends migrating legacy 'No channel' clusters to Regular or Extended channels as Priority 2 in Phase 1

assertions.expectation: Mentions using gcloud container clusters get-upgrade-info to check each cluster's auto-upgrade status, target versions, and EoS timestamps
assertions.reason: Provides specific command examples using get-upgrade-info and mentions it returns autoUpgradeStatus, EoS timestamps, target versions

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for identifying clusters using deprecated APIs
assertions.reason: Specifically mentions GKE Deprecation Dashboard in console and provides gcloud recommender insights list command for deprecation detection

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking EoS timelines for each cluster and prioritizing those closest to EoS
assertions.reason: Creates cluster categorization matrix with EoS dates and explicitly prioritizes clusters approaching EoS as 'Priority 1 — Critical EoS clusters'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as an ongoing monitoring tool
assertions.reason: While it mentions Cloud Logging alert for upgrade events, it doesn't specifically mention EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a monitoring tool

assertions.expectation: Recommends enrolling in scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance) for all clusters
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows command to enable scheduled upgrade notifications and mentions 72h advance warning

assertions.expectation: Suggests standardizing on a channel strategy: dev→Rapid, staging→Regular, prod→Stable/Extended
assertions.reason: Provides multi-environment channel strategy with dev/staging on Regular and production on Stable channel

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for fleet-wide upgrade ordering — should not be the primary recommendation for fleet remediation
assertions.reason: Mentions rollout sequencing briefly as part of automation tools but focuses primarily on manual remediation approach with channel strategy and maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE Insights and Recommendations in the console for identifying issues like version skew
assertions.reason: Mentions GKE Deprecation Dashboard in console, Recommender API, and GKE Recommender Integration for identifying various issues including deprecated APIs and compatibility
